name: Supreme Engineering Limited
summary: Supreme Engineering Limited manufactures and sells special alloys and special wire products. Its Special Steels division manufactures special alloys, such as super alloys, precipitation hardening steels, martensitic stainless steel, austenitic stainless steel, high strength steel, and high speed steels for use in sectors, such as aerospace, space, defense, nuclear power, thermal power, oil and gas, and heavy engineering. The company's Wire division provides wires, bright bars, fine wires, and profiles for use in automotive, oil and gas, industrial machinery, and hand tools industries. Supreme Engineering Limited was founded in 1987 and is based in Navi Mumbai, India.
